_comment: One message template per job stage. Placeholders: {firstName} {installType} {nextAction} {senderName}. Edit freely - these are the texts your customers get.
lead: Hi {firstName}, thanks for getting in touch about your {installType}. Next step is a site visit so we can measure up and give you a firm price. I'll be in touch to lock in a time. {senderName}
survey_done: Hi {firstName}, thanks for having us out. We've got everything we need from the site visit and your quote is being put together now. You'll have it within a few days. {senderName}
quote_sent: Hi {firstName}, just checking you received the quote for your {installType}. Happy to talk through any of it - just call or reply here. {senderName}
accepted: Hi {firstName}, great news - your job is locked in. We're lining up the trades now and will confirm start dates with you shortly. {senderName}
contractors_booked: Hi {firstName}, your {installType} is booked in with our trades. We'll confirm exact days with you before anyone turns up on site. {senderName}
in_progress: Hi {firstName}, quick update on your {installType}: work is underway and tracking along. Next up: {nextAction}. Any questions, just call. {senderName}
complete: Hi {firstName}, the work on your {installType} is done. We'll do a final walk-through and handover with you, and the final invoice will follow. Thanks for having us. {senderName}
invoiced: Hi {firstName}, the final invoice for your {installType} has been sent through. Once that's settled you're all done - enjoy it! {senderName}
